taskDescription: Arrange the events of gastrulation and neurulation in correct chronological order.
paragraphs: Primitive streak appears in the caudal midline of the epiblast (Day 14–15)
Epiblast cells migrate through the primitive groove to form the three germ layers (gastrulation)
Notochord forms from cells migrating cranially from the primitive node
Neural plate forms from ectoderm induced by the notochord
Neural folds elevate and fuse to form the neural tube (neurulation)
Primitive streak regresses caudally and disappears by end of 4th week
